title: Thelionema grande
taxonomy: Thelionema grande is classified within the family Amaryllidaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelionema. The species Thelionema grande is native to Australia. This plant is further classified as a type of bulbous perennial. Thelionema grande is also known as the golden garlic or golden thumbers.
